title: The Reason for al-Wathiq's Action against the Secretaries This Year
description: Secretaries This Year 'Azzun b. 'Abd al-'Aziz al-An^ari27 reportedly said: We were in alWathiq's company one evening this year. He remarked, "I have no desire for wine tonight; let's have a discussion instead." He sat in his middle portico in the Haruni [Palace],28 in the first edifice, merchant. He was later arrested and his property confiscated under al -Mutawakkil in 232 (846-47), and he died in 233 (847-48); see Tabari, III, 1183; Marin, Reign, 1g and n. 119, Index, 136; below, pp. 65ff.; Amedroz, "Tales," 416ff.; Sourdel, Vizerat, 252-69, esp.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 34
